Interface GUIObserver

All Known Implementing Classes:
GameController, LobbyController, MarketController, PlayerStatusController
public interface GUIObserver
Observer interface for GUI-level game events. All methods have empty default implementations so that implementing classes only need to override the events they care about.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default void
    onActionAvailableChanged(int drawTop, int drawBot)
    Called when the number of draws available to the current player changes.
    default void
    onAskExtraDraw(List<CardDTO> cards, List<BuildingDTO> buildings)
    Called when the player must choose an extra card or building to draw at the end of a round (triggered by the draw-one-more building effect).
    default void
    onBoardInitialized(List<OffertileDTO> tiles, List<DefaultTileDTO> defs)
    Called once at game start with the full initial board layout.
    default void
    onBottomBuildRemoved(int position)
    Called when a building is removed from the bottom building row.
    default void
    onBottomCardRemoved(int position)
    Called when a card is removed from the bottom market row.
    default void
    onCardAddedToTribe(String nickname, CardDTO card)
    Called when a card is added to a player's tribe.
    default void
    onDefaultTileOrderChanged(List<PlayerDTO> order)
    Called when the order of players on the default tile changes.
    default void
    onError(String message)
    Called when an error message is received from the server.
    default void
    onEventResolved(int eventID, EVENT_TYPE eventType)
    Called when an event card is resolved.
    default void
    onGamePhaseChanged(GAME_PHASE phase)
    Called when the game phase transitions to a new state.
    default void
    onMarketInitialized(List<CardDTO> top, List<CardDTO> bot, List<BuildingDTO> topBld, List<BuildingDTO> botBld)
    Called once at game start with the full initial market state.
    default void
    onPlayerAdded(PlayerDTO player)
    Called when a new player joins the lobby.
    default void
    onPlayerDisconnected(String nickname)
    Called when a player disconnects from the game.
    default void
    onPlayerFoodChanged(String nickname, int newFood)
    Called when a player's food supply changes.
    default void
    onPlayerPlacedOnOfferTile(String nickname, int tilePosition, int fromSlot)
    Called when a player moves their totem to an offer tile.
    default void
    onPlayerPPChanged(String nickname, int newPP)
    Called when a player's prestige-point total changes.
    default void
    onPlayerReconnected(String nickname)
    Called when a previously disconnected player reconnects.
    default void
    onPlayerToPlaceChanged(String nickname)
    Called when the player who must place their totem changes.
    default void
    onPlayerToPlayChanged(String nickname)
    Called when the active player (whose turn it is to draw/play) changes.
    default void
    onRankReceived(Map<Integer, List<String>> leaderboards)
    Called when the server sends the global leaderboard in response to an askForRank request.
    default void
    onServerDead()
    Called when the server becomes unreachable and the connection is considered dead.
    default void
    onTopBuildingRefreshed(List<BuildingDTO> topBld)
    Called when the top building row is refreshed after an end-of-round market action.
    default void
    onTopBuildRemoved(int position)
    Called when a building is removed from the top building row.
    default void
    onTopCardRefreshed(List<CardDTO> top)
    Called when the top card row is refreshed after an end-of-round market action.
    default void
    onTopCardRemoved(int position)
    Called when a card is removed from the top market row.
    default void
    onWinners(List<PlayerDTO> winners)
    Called when the game ends and winners are determined.

  • Method Details

    • onGamePhaseChanged

      default void onGamePhaseChanged(GAME_PHASE phase)
      Called when the game phase transitions to a new state.
      Parameters:
      phase - the new game phase.

    • onPlayerAdded

      default void onPlayerAdded(PlayerDTO player)
      Called when a new player joins the lobby.
      Parameters:
      player - the DTO of the newly added player.

    • onError

      default void onError(String message)
      Called when an error message is received from the server.
      Parameters:
      message - a human-readable description of the error.

    • onPlayerToPlaceChanged

      default void onPlayerToPlaceChanged(String nickname)
      Called when the player who must place their totem changes.
      Parameters:
      nickname - the nickname of the player who must place next.

    • onPlayerToPlayChanged

      default void onPlayerToPlayChanged(String nickname)
      Called when the active player (whose turn it is to draw/play) changes.
      Parameters:
      nickname - the nickname of the player whose turn it is.

    • onPlayerPPChanged

      default void onPlayerPPChanged(String nickname, int newPP)
      Called when a player's prestige-point total changes.
      Parameters:
      nickname - the nickname of the player whose PP changed.
      newPP - the new prestige-point total.

    • onPlayerFoodChanged

      default void onPlayerFoodChanged(String nickname, int newFood)
      Called when a player's food supply changes.
      Parameters:
      nickname - the nickname of the player whose food changed.
      newFood - the new food total.

    • onMarketInitialized

      default void onMarketInitialized(List<CardDTO> top, List<CardDTO> bot, List<BuildingDTO> topBld, List<BuildingDTO> botBld)
      Called once at game start with the full initial market state.
      Parameters:
      top - the initial top card row.
      bot - the initial bottom card row.
      topBld - the initial top building row.
      botBld - the initial bottom building row.

    • onTopCardRemoved

      default void onTopCardRemoved(int position)
      Called when a card is removed from the top market row.
      Parameters:
      position - zero-based index of the removed card.

    • onBottomCardRemoved

      default void onBottomCardRemoved(int position)
      Called when a card is removed from the bottom market row.
      Parameters:
      position - zero-based index of the removed card.

    • onTopBuildRemoved

      default void onTopBuildRemoved(int position)
      Called when a building is removed from the top building row.
      Parameters:
      position - zero-based index of the removed building.

    • onBottomBuildRemoved

      default void onBottomBuildRemoved(int position)
      Called when a building is removed from the bottom building row.
      Parameters:
      position - zero-based index of the removed building.

    • onTopCardRefreshed

      default void onTopCardRefreshed(List<CardDTO> top)
      Called when the top card row is refreshed after an end-of-round market action.
      Parameters:
      top - the new top card row.

    • onTopBuildingRefreshed

      default void onTopBuildingRefreshed(List<BuildingDTO> topBld)
      Called when the top building row is refreshed after an end-of-round market action.
      Parameters:
      topBld - the new top building row.

    • onBoardInitialized

      default void onBoardInitialized(List<OffertileDTO> tiles, List<DefaultTileDTO> defs)
      Called once at game start with the full initial board layout.
      Parameters:
      tiles - the list of offer tile DTOs.
      defs - the list of default tile DTOs.

    • onPlayerPlacedOnOfferTile

      default void onPlayerPlacedOnOfferTile(String nickname, int tilePosition, int fromSlot)
      Called when a player moves their totem to an offer tile.
      Parameters:
      nickname - the nickname of the player who moved.
      tilePosition - the index of the destination offer tile.
      fromSlot - the slot within the tile that was occupied.

    • onDefaultTileOrderChanged

      default void onDefaultTileOrderChanged(List<PlayerDTO> order)
      Called when the order of players on the default tile changes.
      Parameters:
      order - the new ordered list of players on the default tile.

    • onActionAvailableChanged

      default void onActionAvailableChanged(int drawTop, int drawBot)
      Called when the number of draws available to the current player changes.
      Parameters:
      drawTop - the number of top-row draws remaining.
      drawBot - the number of bottom-row draws remaining.

    • onCardAddedToTribe

      default void onCardAddedToTribe(String nickname, CardDTO card)
      Called when a card is added to a player's tribe.
      Parameters:
      nickname - the nickname of the player who received the card.
      card - the DTO of the card that was added.

    • onEventResolved

      default void onEventResolved(int eventID, EVENT_TYPE eventType)
      Called when an event card is resolved.
      Parameters:
      eventID - the unique identifier of the resolved event.
      eventType - the category of the resolved event.

    • onWinners

      default void onWinners(List<PlayerDTO> winners)
      Called when the game ends and winners are determined.
      Parameters:
      winners - the ordered list of winning players.

    • onAskExtraDraw

      default void onAskExtraDraw(List<CardDTO> cards, List<BuildingDTO> buildings)
      Called when the player must choose an extra card or building to draw at the end of a round (triggered by the draw-one-more building effect).
      Parameters:
      cards - the top card row snapshot available for the extra draw.
      buildings - the top building row snapshot available for the extra draw.

    • onPlayerDisconnected

      default void onPlayerDisconnected(String nickname)
      Called when a player disconnects from the game.
      Parameters:
      nickname - the nickname of the disconnected player.

    • onPlayerReconnected

      default void onPlayerReconnected(String nickname)
      Called when a previously disconnected player reconnects.
      Parameters:
      nickname - the nickname of the reconnected player.

    • onServerDead

      default void onServerDead()
      Called when the server becomes unreachable and the connection is considered dead.

    • onRankReceived

      default void onRankReceived(Map<Integer, List<String>> leaderboards)
      Called when the server sends the global leaderboard in response to an askForRank request.
      Parameters:
      leaderboards - a map from player count to ordered list of leaderboard row strings.
